scores.correctness_notes: Gets basic Loki configuration correct (override, type, location, services, labels) but critically misses that Pebble supports three protocol types: loki, opentelemetry (OTLP), and syslog. The agent incorrectly states loki is 'the only supported target type', which is a factual error against the gold standard.
scores.hallucination_notes: Claims loki is 'Currently the only supported target type' — false, opentelemetry and syslog are also supported. Uses {{ model }} Jinja-style template syntax in labels instead of $ENV_VARS substitution shown in gold standard. Claims payload is 'Protobuf (preferred) or JSON' — not in gold standard and unverified. Claims logs are 'buffered locally if Loki is unreachable and replayed on reconnect' — not in gold standard. Subtract syntax [all, -debug-sidecar] not verified in gold standard.
